Package.Name: Logging defaults
Package.Summary: Emit bounded structured events and probe the AppDefaults logging configurators.

Result.Title: Captured safe events
Result.Empty: Run the sample to inspect bounded records.

Tips.Structured: Templates and scalar properties remain structured.
Tips.Safe: No stack trace, scope, path, or arbitrary object is rendered.

Purpose.Title: Purpose
Purpose.Body: Exercise the host logger and fresh AppDefaults builders without replacing the global logger.

Boundaries.Title: Boundaries
Boundaries.Host: Uses the host ILoggerFactory when available.
Boundaries.Bounded: At most twenty generated records are shown.
Boundaries.NoStack: Exception stack traces are never rendered.
Boundaries.Allowlist: Only allowlisted scalar properties are displayed.

structured.Name: Structured events
structured.Description: Emit bounded information events with scalar properties.

exception.Name: Safe exception
exception.Description: Emit one synthetic error without a stack trace.
